creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
As of Thu  5 May 2022 10:25:37 NZST, the latest commit in the ports repo as reported by https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/ has a timestamp of 2022-05-04 20:32:15:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=3695c3c3351f88011ba145aa5d7aad75e3c9400b

However, a clone of anongit@git.freebsd.org:ports.git reports the latest commit at 1-May-2022:
jade:ports,10:27am# date
Thu  5 May 2022 10:28:01 NZST
jade:ports,10:28am# git remote -v
origin  anongit@git.freebsd.org:ports.git (fetch)
origin  anongit@git.freebsd.org:ports.git (push)
jade:ports,10:28am# git status
On branch main
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'.

nothing to commit, working tree clean
jade:ports,10:28am# git pull
Already up to date.
jade:ports,10:28am# git log
commit 92f35ee637fbcae48cf883deb68036ed114486ef (HEAD -> main, origin/main, origin/HEAD)
Author: Yuri Victorovich <yuri@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Sun May 1 18:02:31 2022 -0700

    math/ensmallen: Update 2.17.0 -> 2.19.0
    
    Reported by:    portscout
...
